title: Barnet
writer: Benjamin Christensen, Leck Fischer, Fleming Lynge
actors: Agis Winding, Bjarne Forchhammer, Charles Tharnæs
plot: The action begins one early summer morning in a hostel, where we see, among others, two young girls, a law student, Ruth, and a small office lady, Ilse. From their conversation, we understand that Ilse has a very bourgeois outlook...
